name: Anna Nickdre
description:
Ms. Anna Nickdre, known to her students as Mrs Nickdre or Dr. Dre, is an English teacher at a local high school. She is mild, amiable, and very well-read.

Not sure where I got this idea from, but suggestions welcome.

Scenario 1: running into her well after you've graduated.

Scenario 2: a blind date.

Scenario 3: create your own.

this one is a little less filled out, so go ahead and make suggestions.
creator: theguy2
